title: Established Junk Removal and Recycling Business - Kansas City, MO
reasonForSelling: The owner has other business interests he is focusing on.
supportTraining: Franchisor offers comprehensive online and in-person classroom training and onboarding. This franchise system is one of the most supportive, in terms of corporate and
description:
This is a 5-year established, nationally branded junk removal franchise operating in two of the most desirable and high-density territories in the Kansas City market. The business holds exclusive territory rights, along with a development contract covering the full Kansas City region, creating substantial long-term expansion potential.

This is an essential service business operating under a recognized national franchise system with established processes, branding, and operational support. The foundation is in place — trucks, territory, brand presence, and reputation — and is ready for a growth-oriented owner-operator to fully capitalize on the opportunity.
